state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-10 — all 10 planned tasks completed.
=== COMPLETED THIS BATCH ===
| # | Type | Task | Status | |---|---|---|---| | 1 | Framework | gad-104: skill/agent/type attributes in TASK-REGISTRY.xml | done | | 2 | Framework | gad-108: pipeline as formal task type | done | | 3 | CLI | gad eval --install-skills (copy skill into eval template) | done | | 4 | CLI | gad rounds (list/show/json round data) | done | | 5 | Skill | gad:create-skill slash command | done | | 6 | Skill | gad:merge-skill slash command | done | | 7 | CLI | gad data list/get/set (CRUD for data/*.json) | done | | 8 | Site | SelfEval component (components/landing/self-eval/) | done | | 9 | Eval | reverse-engineer-eval v1 prompt generated with skill installed | ready | | 10 | Cleanup | /gad:join-discord removed | done |
=== NEW CLI COMMANDS === - gad data list — show all data collections - gad data get <file.key> — read value (dot notation) - gad data set <file.key> <value> — write value - gad rounds — list experiment rounds - gad rounds --round N — show round detail - gad rounds --json — JSON output - gad eval run --install-skills <paths> — install skills into eval template before running
=== DECISIONS THIS SESSION (gad-95 through gad-109) === 15 total decisions captured covering: self-evaluation, reverse-engineer eval, skills taxonomy, attribution tagging, enhance workflow, pipeline types, lowdb data CLI, eval skill installation
=== SELF-EVAL (growing) === 2,562 events | 180 tasks (163 done) | 108 decisions | 19.0% overhead | 80% loop compliance
=== NEXT SESSION === 1. Run reverse-engineer-eval v1 agent on grime-time target 2. Wire SelfEval component into page.tsx (user is refactoring landing page) 3. Test gad:create-skill by creating the next skill needed 4. Test gad:merge-skill on overlapping skills 5. User plays round 5 builds and scores them 6. Add per-phase token metrics to compute-self-eval pipeline (gad-103) 7. Respect user's component refactoring (Playable split into subcomponents, Nav refactored, etc.)
